description: Product Description Beanie for Kid, Stretchy Childrens Thermal Hat Insulated Wolly Hat with Turn Up for Boys Girls Teenagers, Double Layer for Baby in Winter Autumn Why choose Wmcaps beanie for you little ones? Wmcaps recently presents a beanie that is specially for kids from 3-12 years old. With never out of date classic design, great material and strict quality control, this baby boys girls beanie can keep your little one warm, cozy and looking adorable. With a quality leather logo at the side, and multiple color options, get the lovable look of the basic solid color beanie and keep your sweet kiddo snuggly in the fall and winter weather. Style, comfort, and warmth come together in this eye-catching winter accessory combination in winter style. Your little ones will be all set for fun and adventure in these fashionable winter accessories and a great addition to their winter clothing wardrobe. Products Features: - Mainly Soft Acrylic - Kid beanie with classical and fashion design, All-round warmth in most seasons. - Comfortable soft materials, provides cozy touching experience. - Delicate Sewing thread, provide added durability. - Suitable for boys and girls of most ages, classic, simple and stylish, easy to match with boy's and girls's winter clothes. - Made exclusively by Wmcaps, with premium quality leather logo - Comes with beautiful package, perfect gifts for your children, grandsons, friends kids and so on when the cold weather comes. Come in multiple colors Wmcaps kids winter hat got 5 classic colors: black, grey, blue, orange and rosy red. In this colorful knit hat you'll find your baby super cute, and helps to make your child easier to spot in daycare or playing outside. Making it a great, quality unisex accessory for tots and kids alike. Leather Logo Proudly presented and branded by Wmcaps Thick Knitted Hat Beautifully and softly knitted fabric, skin-friendly, comfortable. Perfect accessory for any outdoors activities or gift for friends and family. 2 ways to wear Aiming from toddlers to teenagers, the perfect strechability makes this hat great for wide range of children, also it can be wear as cuffed beanie or slouch hat A simple wooly hat AND a perfect gift idea for boys and girls Q&A Q: Will this hat be too big for 3 years old? A: This hat is aiming for children from 3-12, so no it won't be too big. Q: Will the color fade? A: This hat is made of high quality material, also strictly tested and proved it won't fade. Q: Can it be washed in the washing machine? A: We recommend hand washing. Q: Can you unfold the cuff? A: Yes, They are not attached at all so you can completely unfold or fold it more as needed Beanie Ribbed beanie LED lighted beanie beanie and scarf set Gym sack with light Fishing Hat Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 7,574 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,732 4.7 out of 5 stars 9,455 4.3 out of 5 stars 60 — 4.5 out of 5 stars 303 Price £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 — no data — no data — no data For grown ups ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data ✓ Summer use no data no data no data no data no data ✓
